seoTitle: Alphington vs Altona — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Alphington and Altona. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Alphington and Altona.
heading: Alphington vs Altona — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Alphington, Victoria and Altona, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Altona has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Alphington (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Alphington or Altona safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Alphington has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Altona scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Alphington scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Altona scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Alphington or Altona?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Altona has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
